creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vanilla
Date: Thu May  8 13:53:58 2014
New Revision: 353299
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353299
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353299/

Log:
  Support staging.
  
  PR:		ports/188468
  Approved by:	portmgr@

Modified:
  head/devel/py-TurboJinja/Makefile
  head/devel/py-TurboJinja/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/py-TurboJinja/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-TurboJinja/Makefile	Thu May  8 13:46:14 2014	(r353298)
+++ head/devel/py-TurboJinja/Makefile	Thu May  8 13:53:58 2014	(r353299)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	TurboJinja
 PORTVERSION=	0.9.1
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -11,6 +11,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	nivit@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Jinja (Django & Smarty-like) template for TurboGears
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}TurboGears>=1.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-turbogears
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Jinja>=0.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-Jinja
@@ -19,5 +21,4 @@ USES=		zip
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/py-TurboJinja/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-TurboJinja/pkg-descr	Thu May  8 13:46:14 2014	(r353298)
+++ head/devel/py-TurboJinja/pkg-descr	Thu May  8 13:53:58 2014	(r353299)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Jinja (Django & Smarty-like) template for TurboGears
 
 Author:	Fred Lin
-WWW:	http://sourceforge.net/projects/tgwidgets/
+WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/tgwidgets/
